rulings.Case Title: TOM J. BENO VS. JPMORGAN CHASE, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 2, 2012, line 1. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK's DEMURRER TO 3RD AMENDED COMPLAINT sustained without leave to amend as to first cause of action. Overruled as to second cause of action. (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: JOANNE REINHART VS. BANK OF AMERICA N.A., A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 2, 2012, line 2. DEFENDANT BANK OF AMERICA ALTERNATIVE LOAN TRUST 2004-4, RECONTRUST COMPANY, N.A., BANK OF AMERICA's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Hearing Required. (Dept. 501)

rulings.Case Title: BRUCE SPROUL VS. KIM BEDGOOD AKA KIMBERLY BEDGOOD et al
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 2, 2012, line 5. PLAINTIFF BRUCE SPROUL's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Grant. Plaintiff shifted burden and defendant presented no competent evidence in contravention. (Dept. 501)

rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Extablish Admissions From Deft And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Deft; Memo Of P & A
rulings.Rulings: Unlawful Detainer Law and Motion Calendar for Friday March 2, 2012, line 4. PLAINTIFF AMISH PATEL's motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Extablish Admissions From Deft And Req. For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendant grant discovery requests. No opposition filed. Totality of sanctions $540. (501/REQ)
